title: DEBT AND CREDIT COUNSELING - 211info
text: MONEY MANAGEMENT INTERNATIONAL DEBT AND CREDIT COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers credit counseling and debt repayment counseling. -Credit Counseling: A certified credit counselor meets with the client to review and evaluate the client's current financial situation; develop strategies to manage creditor payments as part of a balanced budget; evaluate personal financial goals; and create an action plan. -Debt Management Program: Offers the implementation of a structured debt management plan (DMP) to pay off debt. Negotiates with the client's creditors for reduced fees and interest for the term of the program. The client makes one monthly payment to the program administrator, which electronically disburses the funds to each creditor. The program continues until the debt is completely paid off. Includes follow-up visits. 12603 SW Freeway Suite 450 Stafford, TX 77477 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (866) 889-9347 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (866) 889-9347 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or visit website. Services can be provided in person, by phone, or online. FEES: Credit Counseling: None Debt Repayment: Varies with a maximum of $69 per month DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Credit Counseling Debt Consolidation Services Personal Financial Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING COUNSELING SERVICES MONEY MANAGEMENT - BANKRUPTCY COUNSELING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MONEY MANAGEMENT INTERNATIONAL
